description: Export the survey dataset from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\colorado_solar_farm.txt' (Format: P,X,Y,Z,D) to a Google Earth KML file using TopoCal. The data represents a solar farm site in the Colorado foothills (UTM Zone 13 North). Ensure the export uses the correct coordinate system (UTM, Hemisphere North, Zone 13) and save the file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\site_export.kml'. Leave TopoCal open when finished.
